description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a mix of materials including stone, wood, and glass. The exterior walls are primarily clad in light-colored stone and wood panels, with large angular sections of dark glass or black material creating a striking visual contrast. The roof is covered with reddish-brown terracotta tiles and includes a unique, multi-level structure with a partial overhang. There is a recessed entryway with a visible door and a tiled patio area, suggesting an open, welcoming entrance. The house has minimal visible windows, with most glass elements integrated into the angular lower sections. The overall appearance is contemporary and bold, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern house with stone and wood cladding, terracotta-tiled roof, and bold geometric glass accents. Features a recessed entryway and a multi-level roof structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, tiled patio, and a mix of stone, wood, and dark glass panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terracotta-tiled roof, stone walls, and angular glass section beneath a wooden overhang.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear view of the overhanging roof, stone and wood facade, and large glass panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back patio area, stone and wood cladding, and minimal window openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single door, tiled patio, and no visible porch or columns.
